input.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import json, glob
queries={
'sudan_hospital':['Sudan','teaching hospital','hospital attacked','North Darfur','Khartoum','Kordofan'],
'eritrea_eswatini':['Eritrea','Eswatini','Africa Cup of Nations qualifying','AFCON qualifying','Asmara','Benghazi','Cairo','Kampala','Nairobi'],
'mass_grave':['mass grave','dozens of bodies','exhumed','children'],
'hezbollah_target':['Hezbollah','Kiryat Shmona','Metula','Nahariya','Manara','Margaliot','northern Israel','rockets'],
'lebanon_minaret':['mosque minaret','minaret','southern Lebanon','Kfar Kila','Khiam','Aita al-Shaab','Aitaroun'],
'ny_collision':['ground vehicle collision','New York airport','departed','landing','JFK','LaGuardia','Newark'],
'fifteen_point':['15-point plan','intermediaries','Oman','Qatar','Trump plan','conveyed to Iran'],
'crashed_airforce':['crashed plane','crashed aircraft','KC-135','F-15','United States Air Force','US Air Force'],
'north_london_arson':['North London','arson attack','journalists surrounded','BBC','Sky News','ITV'],
'iqair':['IQAir','most polluted','World Air Quality'],
'dennis_coyle':['Dennis Coyle','Afghanistan release','humanitarian grounds','facilitated'],
'lukashenko':['Lukashenko','official visit','first official visit'],
'ipl_blitzer':['David Blitzer','Bolt Ventures','IPL franchise','Rajasthan Royals','Sunrisers'],
}
files=sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/03/19/articles.jsonl'))
for name,pats in queries.items():
    hits=[]
    for path in files:
        for line in open(path,encoding='utf-8'):
            a=json.loads(line); text=(a.get('title') or '')+'\n'+(a.get('content') or '')
            low=text.lower()
            if any(p.lower() in low for p in pats):
                if name=='sudan_hospital' and not ('sudan' in low and 'hospital' in low): continue
                if name=='mass_grave' and not ('mass grave' in low or ('exhum' in low and 'bodies' in low)): continue
                if name=='hezbollah_target' and not ('hezbollah' in low and ('rocket' in low or 'northern israel' in low or 'kiryat' in low or 'metula' in low or 'target' in low)): continue
                if name=='lebanon_minaret' and not ('minaret' in low or ('mosque' in low and 'southern lebanon' in low)): continue
                if name=='ny_collision' and not (('new york' in low or 'jfk' in low or 'laguardia' in low or 'newark' in low) and ('collision' in low or 'landing' in low)): continue
                if name=='fifteen_point' and not ('15-point' in low or ('trump' in low and 'plan' in low and 'iran' in low)): continue
                if name=='north_london_arson' and not ('north london' in low and ('arson' in low or 'journalist' in low)): continue
                if name=='iqair' and not ('iqair' in low or 'most polluted' in low): continue
                idx=min([low.find(p.lower()) for p in pats if low.find(p.lower())!=-1] or [0])
                hits.append((a.get('date_publish'),a.get('source'),a.get('title'),text[max(0,idx-350):min(len(text),idx+1200)].replace('\n',' ')))
    print('\n###',name,'hits',len(hits))
    for h in hits[:8]:
        print('---',h[0],h[1],h[2])
        print(h[3][:1500])
PY

input.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import json, glob
terms=['teaching hospital','El Obeid Teaching Hospital','El-Fasher Teaching Hospital','Fasher Teaching','Kadugli Teaching','Nyala Teaching','Sudan hospital']
for term in terms:
    print('\nTERM',term)
    n=0
    for path in sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/03/*/articles.jsonl')):
        day=path.split('/')[-2]
        if day>'19': continue
        for line in open(path,encoding='utf-8'):
            a=json.loads(line); text=(a.get('title') or '')+'\n'+(a.get('content') or '')
            idx=text.lower().find(term.lower())
            if idx!=-1:
                n+=1
                print('---',a.get('date_publish'),a.get('source'),a.get('title'),'[',path,']')
                print(text[max(0,idx-400):min(len(text),idx+1200)].replace('\n',' ')[:1600])
                if n>=10: break
        if n>=10: break
    print('hits',n)
PY

UC Davis medical students showcase research that could shape future health care The UC Davis Medical Center is one of the nation's top teaching hospitals, and before med students can earn their medical degree, they need to show they know how to conduct research. Some of the Sacramento region's brightest young minds in medicine revealed their research in a forum at UC Davis' Aggie Square on Thursday. "The reason why a lot of us come to UC Davis is for the research opportunities," med student Cansu Oktem said. Susan Murin, dean of the UC Davis School of Medicine, said the projects these students are working on could one day help save lives. "We really are advancing science and advancing medicine to take care of patients," Murin said. Dermatology student Aliyah Parker is studying the need for more skin cancer outreach in communities of color. "Research has shown when people do get skin cancer, people's skin of color, if they are diagnosed, usually it's diagnosed at a later stage," Parker said. Another group of researchers is focusing on the health impacts of using marijuana. "There's a lot of stigma around cannabis use, so we're trying to put more actual scientific data on this to see this is actually true, this might be false," med student Maxim Orlov said. python - <<'PY'
import json, glob
terms=['Eritrea vs Eswatini','Eritrea Eswatini','Eritrea host Eswatini','Eritrea will host','Eswatini in the first leg','2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualifying']
for term in terms:
 print('\nTERM',term)
 n=0
 for path in sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/03/*/articles.jsonl')):
  day=path.split('/')[-2]
  if day>'19': continue
  for line in open(path,encoding='utf-8'):
   a=json.loads(line); text=(a.get('title') or '')+'\n'+(a.get('content') or '')
   idx=text.lower().find(term.lower())
   if idx!=-1:
    n+=1; print('---',a.get('date_publish'),a.get('source'),a.get('title'),'[',path,']')
    print(text[max(0,idx-400):min(len(text),idx+1200)].replace('\n',' ')[:1600])
    if n>=10: break
  if n>=10: break
 print('hits',n)
PY

input.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import os, pandas as pd
print('state_exists', os.path.exists('state.json'))
if os.path.exists('state.json'):
    print(open('state.json',encoding='utf-8').read()[:6000])
df=pd.read_csv('market.csv', dtype={'qid':str})
print('rows', len(df), 'active', (~df.is_resolved).sum(), 'resolved', df.is_resolved.sum())
print('cols', list(df.columns))
res=df[df.is_resolved].copy(); res['resolution_date_dt']=pd.to_datetime(res['resolution_date'], errors='coerce')
print('\nlatest resolved')
for _,r in res.sort_values('resolution_date_dt', ascending=False).head(30).iterrows():
    print(r.qid, r.resolution_date, r.ground_truth, '|', str(r.title)[:190].replace('\n',' '), '| pred=', r.get('market_aggregate', r.get('my_prediction', None)))
act=df[~df.is_resolved].copy(); act['resolution_date_dt']=pd.to_datetime(act['resolution_date'], errors='coerce')
print('\nactive due soon')
for _,r in act.sort_values('resolution_date_dt').head(70).iterrows():
    print(r.qid, r.resolution_date, '|', str(r.title)[:210].replace('\n',' '), '| pred=', r.get('market_aggregate', r.get('my_prediction', None)))
missing=act[act['market_aggregate'].isna()] if 'market_aggregate' in act else act[act.get('my_prediction').isna()]
print('\nmissing_active_predictions', len(missing))
for _,r in missing.iterrows(): print(r.qid, r.resolution_date, r.title)
PY
